input.question: How has the average overall evaluation rating changed per academic year?

payload.question: How has the average overall evaluation rating changed per academic year?

output.sql:
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  AVG(overall_evaluation_rating) AS avg_overall_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS response_count
FROM evaluations
WHERE overall_evaluation_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY academic_year ASC;

visualization.description: Average overall evaluation rating by academic year
visualization.title: Average Overall Evaluation Rating — Per Academic Year

payload.sql:
SELECT
  academic_year AS academic_year,
  AVG(overall_evaluation_rating) AS avg_overall_rating,
  COUNT(*) AS response_count
FROM evaluations
WHERE overall_evaluation_rating IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY academic_year
ORDER BY academic_year ASC;
